headline: SoFi's Valuation Premium Suggests Growth Confidence But Also Risk
summary: SOFI's valuation premium reflects confidence in its growth story, but it also raises the stakes if execution or earnings momentum slows.

raw.headline: SoFi's Valuation Premium Suggests Growth Confidence But Also Risk

headline: A Taste of Paris, Powered by Square: Ladurée Canada Goes All-In on Square’s Commerce Platform
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif. & TORONTO, June 24, 2026--Square today announced that Ladurée Canada, the Canadian franchise of the world-renowned Parisian patisserie, has selected Square as its exclusive commerce platform across all Canadian locations. The partnership brings Square to Ladurée Canada's expanding footprint – from boutique tea salons and café-style locations to its airport carriages, pop-ups, and pastry laboratories – as they accelerate their next phase of growth across the

headline: Runlayer Raises $30M Series A to Help Enterprises Go All In On AI
summary: Runlayer, the platform helping companies become AI-native, today announced a $30 million Series A led by Felicis, with participation from Khosla Ventures. This brings Runlayer's total capital raised to $42 million.

raw.headline: Runlayer Raises $30M Series A to Help Enterprises Go All In On AI
raw.summary: Runlayer, the platform helping companies become AI-native, today announced a $30 million Series A led by Felicis, with participation from Khosla Ventures. This brings Runlayer's total capital raised to $42 million.

headline: Cerebras CEO Feldman says margin forecast was 'misunderstood' as stock plummets after earnings
summary: Andrew Feldman, co-founder and CEO at Cerebras Systems, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the company's first earnings report since going public in May, its outlook for gross margin, and more.

raw.headline: Cerebras CEO Feldman says margin forecast was 'misunderstood' as stock plummets after earnings
raw.summary: Andrew Feldman, co-founder and CEO at Cerebras Systems, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the company's first earnings report since going public in May, its outlook for gross margin, and more.

headline: Elizabeth Warren Warns AI Could Eliminate Millions Of Jobs As Oracle Becomes Latest Big Tech To Reveal 21,000 Workforce Cuts: 'We Shouldn't Wait…'
summary: Elizabeth Warren warned AI could eliminate millions of jobs after Oracle revealed 21,000 layoffs linked in part to AI adoption.
